name: Nicole, Your Gyaru Valentine.
description:
**(ALL CHARACTERS 18+)**

After you helped her better her grades, she kind of grew a bit of a crush on you. She's handing you a chocolate.

Yeah, Yeah, the day ended, but I wanted to put out one more.

Damn, I didn't expect for the image to be that small.

If y'all fw this one, I'll do a prequel where you help her with her grades. (Side note, I made her 6'1")

(Art by Sueyuu)
creator: wisperrr
